arts.ttl: Flick takes a check on Quim Junyent in Barca training
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Quim Junyent was a notable presence in first-team training on Saturday as Hansi Flick took a check on the teenager. Flick has been more than willing to give youth a chance since arriving at the club and Junyent will be hoping he could be in line for some precious first-team minutes in the near future.

arts.ttl: Rashford willing to take pay cut for Barca move - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is prepared to take a wage cut to join Barcelona from Manchester United, Real Madrid show an interest in Aston Villa forward Jhon Duran, Newcastle United plan new long-term contract for Alexander Isak, plus more.

arts.sum: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford is desperate for a move away from the club after being dropped by boss Ruben Amorim from the squad. The attacker has expressed his desire of a new challenge in his career after seeing limited playing time under Amorim. arts.sum: Barcelona are eager for one of their wingers to leave before the closure of the transfer window. Hansi Flick's side are interested in a potential loan move for Manchester United's Marcus Rashford.
